modbus_rtu_slave_create.message0: Create Modbus RTU slave %1 Serial port %2 Transmit enable pin %3 Receive enable pin %4
modbus_rtu_slave_create.tooltip: Create a Modbus RTU slave instance. Fill in the DE/RE pin with -1 to indicate automatic hardware switching.

modbus_rtu_slave_set_response_delay.message0: Modbus slave %1 Set response delay %2 milliseconds
modbus_rtu_slave_set_response_delay.tooltip: Set the response delay to avoid the host DE pin releasing too slowly

modbus_rtu_slave_begin.message0: Modbus slave %1 Start Device ID %2 Baud rate %3 Serial port format %4
modbus_rtu_slave_begin.tooltip: Set the slave address, baud rate and serial port verification format

modbus_rtu_slave_poll.tooltip: Frequently called to handle primary site read and write requests
modbus_rtu_slave_poll.message1: Executed when receiving a valid request %1

modbus_rtu_slave_bind_coils.message0: Modbus slave %1 Configuration coil array %2 Length %3
modbus_rtu_slave_bind_coils.tooltip: Create an array of boolean coils and tell the library its length

modbus_rtu_slave_bind_discrete.message0: Modbus slave %1 Configure discrete input array %2 Length %3
modbus_rtu_slave_bind_discrete.tooltip: Create a Boolean discrete input array for reporting to the main station

modbus_rtu_slave_bind_holding.message0: Modbus slave %1 Configuration holding register %2 Length %3
modbus_rtu_slave_bind_holding.tooltip: Create a 16-bit holding register array for master station reading and writing

modbus_rtu_slave_bind_input.message0: Modbus slave %1 Configuration input register %2 Length %3
modbus_rtu_slave_bind_input.tooltip: Create a 16-bit input register array for reporting analog values

modbus_rtu_slave_coils_set.tooltip: Writes the specified coil value, which can be used for initialization or local forcing

modbus_rtu_slave_coils_get.tooltip: Read coil status for driving output

modbus_rtu_slave_discrete_set.tooltip: Update discrete input status and report switch value

modbus_rtu_slave_discrete_get.message0: Value of discrete input array %1 index %2
modbus_rtu_slave_discrete_get.tooltip: Read discrete input array, mostly used for debugging

modbus_rtu_slave_holding_set.tooltip: Write to 16-bit holding register to provide default value

modbus_rtu_slave_holding_get.message0: Holds the value of register array %1 index %2
modbus_rtu_slave_holding_get.tooltip: Read holding register value for analog output

modbus_rtu_slave_input_set.tooltip: Write to the 16-bit input register and report the analog value

modbus_rtu_slave_input_get.message0: Value of input register array %1 index %2
modbus_rtu_slave_input_get.tooltip: Read the input register value to facilitate debugging
